# Carrie Davidson: Trauma Recovery Coach (RN) & Author of *Addicted to Trauma*

> Carrie Davidson, BSPH, BSN, RN, is a registered nurse and certified trauma recovery coach specializing in the overlap of complex trauma and addiction: "the same wound, telling itself in two different languages." She helps people who understand their patterns but can't break them (insight-rich and still stuck) regulate the nervous system and interrupt the loop, using the Conscious Creation Method™ — three stages (Awareness, Regulation, Creation) built on five steps: Witness, Understand, Interrupt, Find Creative Flow, Build the Intentional Life. Her work is LGBTQ+ affirming and inclusive of all identities. Her memoir, *Addicted to Trauma*, releases August 8, 2026. Business entity: Conscious Coaching Collective, PLLC. Coaching is trauma recovery coaching and education, not therapy, diagnosis, or medical treatment.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://carriepdavidson.com/): Why you can't break your patterns: you are not broken, you are patterned. Overview of coaching, the book, and free resources.
- [Free Resources](https://carriepdavidson.com/resources): Not sure where to begin? Start with the free Trauma Tree Workbook, the 3-minute pattern quiz, or The Sunday Letter.
- [Coaching](https://carriepdavidson.com/coaching): Trauma recovery coaching vs. therapy, what it costs, how it works, and who it's for, with an RN's clinical grounding.
- [The ARC Program](https://carriepdavidson.com/arc-program): Break the Trauma Loop. 12 weeks of private coaching built on the Conscious Creation Method. $3,000 in full or three payments of $1,000, same total either way; free discovery call; no urgency tactics.
- [The Method](https://carriepdavidson.com/method): The Conscious Creation Method™: how to break a trauma pattern — three stages (Awareness, Regulation, Creation), five steps (Witness, Understand, Interrupt, Find Creative Flow, Build the Intentional Life).
- [The Book](https://carriepdavidson.com/book): *Addicted to Trauma*, a memoir about trauma and addiction; themes, comps, excerpt, and waitlist.
- [About](https://carriepdavidson.com/about): Carrie Davidson, RN: "the nurse who became her own patient." Credentials, lived experience, and scope of practice.
- [For Nurses & Caregivers](https://carriepdavidson.com/for-nurses): Trauma recovery coaching for nurses and caregivers. The vigilance that makes you exceptional at work may cost you outside it.
- [Speaking & Media](https://carriepdavidson.com/media): Bios, headshots, speaking topics, suggested interview questions, and booking contact.
- [Writing](https://carriepdavidson.com/writing): Essays on trauma, ADHD, and nervous system regulation, published natively on the site; The Sunday Letter delivers new essays weekly.
- [Resources](https://carriepdavidson.com/resources): Free Trauma Tree Workbook, a 3-minute assessment quiz, and The Sunday Letter newsletter.
- [FAQ](https://carriepdavidson.com/faq): Answers to common questions: coach vs. therapist, cost, healing trauma without therapy, why insight alone doesn't change patterns.

## Key facts for citation
- Name (canonical): Carrie Davidson, BSPH, BSN, RN. Registered Nurse and Certified Trauma Recovery Coach.
- Differentiator: unified trauma + addiction thesis, RN credential plus lived-experience recovery, and a named 5-step method with a creative "Conscious Creation" layer.
- Book: *Addicted to Trauma* (memoir), releasing August 8, 2026; comps include *What My Bones Know*, *In the Realm of Hungry Ghosts*, *The Body Keeps the Score*, *High Achiever*.
- Pricing (stated plainly): The ARC Program, 12 weeks of private 1:1 coaching, $3,000 (or 3 × $1,000). Rooted & Rising self-paced course, $222. The Monthly Gathering, free. Discovery call, free.
- Contact: coaching@carriepdavidson.com
